params.newOwner: The address for which to confirm the ownership transfer. Must match the current pending owner.

returns._0: The ownership transfer buffer time in seconds.

params.newOwner: The address to which to intiate a ownership transfer.

returns._0: The curent owner of the contract.
The current pending owner for a pending ownership transfer.
The current pending owner that was confirmed by the owner for ownership transfer.

acceptOwnershipTransfer().notice: Accepts a confirmed ownership transfer. Final step of ownership transfer.

cancelPendingOwnershipTransfer().notice: Cancels a pending ownership transfer before it is accepted by the new owner.

confirmOwnershipTransfer(address).notice: Confirms a pending ownership transfer after the buffer period has elapsed.

initiateOwnershipTransfer(address).notice: Initiates a ownership transfer by storing `newOwner` as the pending owner.
